title: PROJECT ENGINEER
description:
• Working hour: 8:30am – 6pm (Mon – Fri)

• Variable Bonus + Excellent Welfare

• Well Established Equipment Manufacturing Company

• On-Job-Training Provided

(Two-way company transport provided from Jurong East Mrt)


Job Descriptions

  • Build and install offshore generator/fire pump systems;
  • Onsite planning and managing of installation teams, sub-cons;
  • Supporting assistant to project manager and ad-hoc;
  • Project Management, including effective cost, time and quality control, manpower planning, Material Take Off & etc
  • Overall project schedule and expertise to meet project objectives and deliverables;
  • Involve in negotiation with subcontractors and suppliers with commercial personnel where necessary;
  • Liaise with clients and consultants on project requirements and attending meetings;
  • Complete assigned projects on schedule and within budget;
  • Identify any potential safety risks within projects and putting in place strategies to mitigate any risks;
  • Prepares for engagement reviews and quality assurance procedures;
  • Ensure that Health, Safety and Environmental Safety standards are met;
  • Supervision of project engineers and other project team members;
  • Ensure smooth delivery of the project completion/site commissioning

Requirements:

  • Candidate must possess at least a diploma Engineering (Mechatronics), Engineering (Mechanical), Engineering (Electrical/Electronic) or equivalent.
  • Minimum 3 years as Project Engineer in oil & gas industry, Energy industry and must have experience in M&E
  • Completed medium sized projects from start to finish
  • Previous project experience in relevant fields e.g. offshore projects, marine projects etc.
  • Commercial knowledge
  • Offshore general Safety Course for Project Manager
  • Managing Work at Height Course
  • Workplace Safety and Health Risk Management Course
  • Possess high level of integrity, good interpersonal and strong leadership skills.
  • Good communication skill
  • Knowledge in energy modelling software (PVsyst), Autocad and construction modelling software
  • A team player who is results and customer oriented, independent, creative, and passionate about energy generation
  • Singaporeans/PRs only.

Interested and suitable candidate kindly click quick apply. Resume will be routed to HR Department. We regret that only suitable candidate will be notified.

postedCompany.description: SATOMAS PTE LTD was set up to deliver all type of heavy duty port machinery globally, including South East Asia and China. Now Satomas is in the position to provide total solution for all type of port equipment via working very closely with different Principal in term of equipment requirement, specification, layout etc.Customers, to date, include Jurong Shipyard Ltd, ZPMC, PSA, Keppel Shipyard,NSL Engineering Ltd and various port operator name in the track record.
postedCompany.name: SATOMAS PTE LTD
